name: Jordan Rivera
summary: Software engineer focused on building practical full-stack tools, automation workflows, and user-facing applications.

projects.name: Resume Tailoring Workspace
bullets: Built a resume tailoring workflow that parses structured resume data and adapts content to job descriptions.
Implemented PDF export and cover letter generation for application-ready documents.
Added browser-extension integration for caching and uploading generated files into application pages.

projects.name: Budget Automation Tool
bullets: Created transaction parsing and categorization workflows for recurring personal finance tasks.
Designed a dashboard for monthly spending summaries and category-level review.
Added basic rules and review states to reduce manual cleanup.

projects.name: Application Helper
bullets: Developed a lightweight app for drafting application responses from saved resume context.
Built reusable UI components for reviewing generated content before export.
Improved repeated application workflows with simple local-first storage.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

bullets: Built internal tools with React and TypeScript to streamline repeated support workflows.
Integrated backend APIs and improved form validation for user-facing dashboards.
Debugged production issues by tracing browser, API, and database behavior across the stack.
